findings.title: npm vulnerability: @langchain/community
findings.description: @langchain/community affected by SSRF Bypass in RecursiveUrlLoader via insufficient URL origin validation. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: @lhci/cli
findings.description: @lhci/utils. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: @lhci/utils
findings.description: lighthouse. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: @next/eslint-plugin-next
findings.description: glob. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: @puppeteer/browsers
findings.description: tar-fs. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.description: cookie. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: @storybook/nextjs
findings.description: node-polyfill-webpack-plugin. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: @tootallnate/once
findings.description: @tootallnate/once vulnerable to Incorrect Control Flow Scoping. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: ajv
findings.description: ajv has ReDoS when using `$data` option. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: axios
findings.description: Axios is Vulnerable to Denial of Service via __proto__ Key in mergeConfig. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: basic-ftp
findings.description: Basic FTP has Path Traversal Vulnerability in its downloadToDir() method. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: bn.js
findings.description: bn.js affected by an infinite loop. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: brace-expansion
findings.description: brace-expansion: Zero-step sequence causes process hang and memory exhaustion. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: browserify-sign
findings.description: elliptic. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: cookie
findings.description: cookie accepts cookie name, path, and domain with out of bounds characters. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: create-ecdh
findings.description: elliptic. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: crypto-browserify
findings.description: browserify-sign. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: diff
findings.description: jsdiff has a Denial of Service vulnerability in parsePatch and applyPatch. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: dompurify
findings.description: DOMPurify is vulnerable to mutation-XSS via Re-Contextualization . Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: elliptic
findings.description: Elliptic Uses a Cryptographic Primitive with a Risky Implementation. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: eslint-config-next
findings.description: @next/eslint-plugin-next. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: external-editor
findings.description: tmp. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: fabric
findings.description: Fabric.js Affected by Stored XSS via SVG Export. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: flatted
findings.description: flatted vulnerable to unbounded recursion DoS in parse() revive phase. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: glob
findings.description: glob CLI: Command injection via -c/--cmd executes matches with shell:true. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: handlebars
findings.description: Handlebars.js has JavaScript Injection via AST Type Confusion by tampering @partial-block. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: http-proxy-agent
findings.description: @tootallnate/once. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: inquirer
findings.description: external-editor. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: jest-environment-jsdom
findings.description: jsdom. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: jsdom
findings.description: http-proxy-agent. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: jspdf
findings.description: jsPDF has PDF Injection in AcroFormChoiceField that allows Arbitrary JavaScript Execution. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: langsmith
findings.description: LangSmith Client SDK Affected by Server-Side Request Forgery via Tracing Header Injection. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: lighthouse
findings.description: @sentry/node. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: lodash
findings.description: Lodash has Prototype Pollution Vulnerability in `_.unset` and `_.omit` functions. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: lodash-es
findings.description: Lodash has Prototype Pollution Vulnerability in `_.unset` and `_.omit` functions. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: minimatch
findings.description: minimatch has a ReDoS via repeated wildcards with non-matching literal in pattern. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: next
findings.description: Next.js self-hosted applications vulnerable to DoS via Image Optimizer remotePatterns configuration. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: node-polyfill-webpack-plugin
findings.description: crypto-browserify. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: nodemailer
findings.description: Nodemailer has SMTP command injection due to unsanitized `envelope.size` parameter. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: path-to-regexp
findings.description: path-to-regexp vulnerable to Regular Expression Denial of Service via multiple route parameters. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: picomatch
findings.description: Picomatch: Method Injection in POSIX Character Classes causes incorrect Glob Matching. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: preact
findings.description: Preact has JSON VNode Injection issue. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: puppeteer-core
findings.description: @puppeteer/browsers. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: qs
findings.description: qs's arrayLimit bypass in comma parsing allows denial of service. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: serialize-javascript
findings.description: Serialize JavaScript is Vulnerable to RCE via RegExp.flags and Date.prototype.toISOString(). Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: socket.io-parser
findings.description: socket.io allows an unbounded number of binary attachments. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: storybook
findings.description: Storybook Dev Server is Vulnerable to WebSocket Hijacking. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: tar-fs
findings.description: tar-fs has a symlink validation bypass if destination directory is predictable with a specific tarball. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: terser-webpack-plugin
findings.description: serialize-javascript. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: tmp
findings.description: tmp allows arbitrary temporary file / directory write via symbolic link `dir` parameter. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: ws
findings.description: ws affected by a DoS when handling a request with many HTTP headers. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: yaml
findings.description: yaml is vulnerable to Stack Overflow via deeply nested YAML collections. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.
